title: WireControl — raw worksheet field/control object (shared type)
description: A worksheet field exactly as the server stores it. This is the currency of `hap worksheet fields <ws_id> --raw` (read), `hap worksheet add-fields --controls` (incremental write) and `hap worksheet update-fields --controls` (FULL-SET replace — dangerous, see fields reference doc), and it is what `hap workflow node controls` returns when discovering fields for node config. Safe editing rule: read the full control set with `fields --raw`, mutate only your target, write the COMPLETE set back (or use the edit-spec field ops which do this for you). The properties below are the common subset — a live control carries more keys; preserve unknown keys verbatim on write-back.

controlId.description: Server-assigned id. Omit when creating; required when updating.

type.description: Control type integer. Common values: 2=text, 6=number, 8=money, 9=flat single-select, 10=multi-select, 11=dropdown single-select, 14=attachment, 15=date, 16=datetime, 26=member, 27=department, 29=relation, 30=foreign-rollup display, 31=formula, 32=concat, 33=autonumber, 34=sub-list (subtable), 36=checkbox, 37=rollup, 38=date formula, 41=rich text, 46=time. Full table: fields reference doc.

hint.description: Input placeholder/help shown in the form.

dataSource.description: Bound source: related worksheet id (relation/sub-list), or the source control reference for formula-family controls.

sourceControlId.description: Source control on the related sheet (rollup/foreign display).

showControls.description: Control ids displayed in a relation card / sub-list columns.

advancedSetting.description: Per-type extra settings, ALL VALUES ARE STRINGS (e.g. relation 'showtype', sub-list 'rowheight'/'max', option 'checktype'). Key dictionary per control type: fields reference doc.

row.description: Form layout row (display order is driven by row, not array order).
